tool.name: send-message
tool.description:
Send an asynchronous (fire-and-forget) message to a target agent session's inbox via the inter-agent messenger.
- targetSessionId: the recipient session or agent identifier (required). The tool derives the inbox topic as `agent.{targetSessionId}.inbox`. - input: the message body (text payload) - correlationId: optional correlation identifier for tracing; auto-generated if not provided
Returns a delivery confirmation noting the target topic and correlationId. If no messenger is configured (NoOp messenger), the result honestly reports that the message was not delivered.

tool-result.output: Message sent to topic agent.translator-sess-1.inbox (correlationId: uuid-abc-123)
